description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels and a small centered front-facing camera cutout at the top. The back is matte black and houses a prominent rectangular camera module in the upper left corner, containing four camera lenses and a flash. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, with subtle seams for buttons. The overall design is minimalist and premium, typical of high-end mobile devices. No external case or cover is present, and the device appears to be in pristine condition.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display and a prominent multi-lens camera module on the matte black back.
description_view_0: Back view showing a matte black surface with a large rectangular camera module containing four lenses and a flash in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the slimness of the device and a slight camera bump, with no visible buttons.
description_view_2: Front view displaying a vibrant, edge-to-edge screen with a small centered camera cutout at the top and minimal bezels.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the device's thinness and a subtle seam, possibly for buttons, but no details are visible.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vibrant abstract wallpaper with orange, black, and white colors, and a small centered camera cutout at the top. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Four camera lenses and a flash are arranged in a rectangular module at the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: No physical buttons are clearly visible in the provided views, but subtle seams on the right side suggest possible button placement.
